title: Fine-Tuned but Zero-Shot 3D Shape Sketch View Similarity and Retrieval
abstract: Demonstrates that meticulous fine-tuning on one class of 3D shapes can lead to improved zero-shot performance on other shape classes for sketch-based 3D shape retrieval, reaching or surpassing supervised accuracy.
method_summary: Transfer learning approach for sketch-based 3D shape retrieval where fine-tuning on a single shape class generalizes zero-shot to unseen classes.

title: Self-supervised Graph Neural Network for Mechanical CAD Retrieval
abstract: Proposes a self-supervised GNN approach for mechanical CAD model retrieval. Addresses the difficulty of describing complex CAD shapes with text by learning graph-based representations directly from B-Rep topology.
method_summary: Self-supervised GNN learning on B-Rep graph structures for content-based mechanical CAD retrieval without text queries.

title: FastCAD: Real-Time CAD Retrieval and Alignment from Scans and Videos
abstract: Proposes FastCAD, a real-time method that simultaneously retrieves and aligns CAD models for all objects in a given scene, directly predicting alignment parameters without iterative refinement.
method_summary: End-to-end neural network for simultaneous real-time CAD model retrieval and 9-DoF alignment from RGB-D scans.

title: Joint Neural SDF Reconstruction and Semantic Segmentation for CAD Models
abstract: Proposes a data-efficient pipeline augmenting implicit SDF-based CAD reconstruction with a part-segmentation head trained under PartField-generated supervision for joint reconstruction and segmentation.
method_summary: Neural SDF reconstruction network augmented with semantic segmentation head using PartField supervision for simultaneous CAD reconstruction and part labeling.

title: Geometry-Conditioned Instance Segmentation for Industrial Objects
abstract: Proposes a CAD-prompted segmentation framework built on SAM3 that uses canonical multi-view renderings of a CAD model as prompt input for geometry-based conditioning independent of appearance.
method_summary: SAM3-based segmentation framework using CAD model multi-view renderings as geometric prompts for industrial object instance segmentation.

title: Few-shot Structure-Informed Machinery Part Segmentation with Foundation Models and Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Proposes a few-shot semantic segmentation approach for machinery with multiple parts that integrates foundation models with GNNs to capture spatial and hierarchical relationships between parts.
method_summary: Foundation model + GNN integration for few-shot machinery part segmentation exploiting structural relationships between components.

title: Repurposing 3D Generative Model for Part Segmentation
abstract: Repurposes pretrained 3D generative models for the task of 3D part segmentation, leveraging the rich shape understanding learned during generation for downstream segmentation tasks.
method_summary: Transfer of pretrained 3D generative model representations to part segmentation, exploiting generative priors for improved segmentation accuracy.

title: Label-Efficient Part Segmentation
abstract: Addresses the annotation bottleneck in part segmentation by leveraging SAM for label-efficient 3D part segmentation with minimal training data requirements.
method_summary: SAM-based label-efficient approach reducing annotation requirements for 3D part segmentation tasks.

title: DiffAssemble: A Unified Graph-Diffusion Model for 2D and 3D Reassembly
abstract: Introduces DiffAssemble, a GNN-based architecture that learns to solve reassembly tasks using a diffusion model formulation, treating elements as graphs for both 2D puzzle and 3D object reassembly.
method_summary: Graph neural network with diffusion model formulation for unified 2D and 3D shape reassembly from fragments.

title: Unsupervised Contrastive Learning for Efficient and Robust Spectral Shape Matching
abstract: Addresses non-rigid 3D shape correspondence via unsupervised contrastive learning in the spectral domain, achieving efficient and robust shape matching without paired supervision.
method_summary: Unsupervised contrastive learning in spectral domain for non-rigid 3D shape correspondence without requiring ground-truth matches.

title: Diffusion Models for Shape Correspondence
abstract: Applies diffusion models to estimate correspondences between pairs of deformable shapes, achieving broad generalization capabilities across categories without category-specific training.
method_summary: Diffusion-based generative approach for cross-category deformable shape correspondence estimation.

title: 3D Shape Matching: From Foundations to Open Challenges and Opportunities
abstract: Comprehensive survey on estimating correspondences between deformed shape instances, covering foundations and open challenges in 3D shape matching for computer graphics applications.
method_summary: Survey paper covering the full landscape of 3D shape matching methods from classical to deep learning approaches.

title: Physics-informed Reduced Order Model with Conditional Neural Fields
abstract: Presents CNF-ROM framework using conditional neural fields for reduced-order modeling to approximate solutions of parametrized PDEs with physics-informed constraints.
method_summary: Conditional neural fields combined with physics-informed learning for parametric PDE reduced-order modeling.

title: Convolutional Neural Network based Reduced Order Modeling for Multiscale Problems
abstract: Combines CNNs with reduced order modeling for efficient simulations of multiscale problems modeled by PDEs, learning compact representations for fast surrogate evaluation.
method_summary: CNN-ROM hybrid combining convolutional feature extraction with reduced-order modeling for multiscale PDE simulation.

title: Latent Neural PDE Solver: a Reduced-Order Modelling Framework for Partial Differential Equations
abstract: Proposes LNS framework where a non-linear autoencoder projects full-order PDE representations onto mesh-reduced space, then a temporal model evolves the latent dynamics.
method_summary: Autoencoder-based latent space projection combined with temporal evolution model for mesh-reduced PDE solving.

title: Learning Nonlinear Reduced Order Models using State-Space Neural Networks with Ordered State Variance
abstract: Presents SSNNO where state variables are ordered in decreasing variance, providing a systematic way of model order reduction with neural state-space models.
method_summary: State-space neural network with variance-ordered states for systematic nonlinear reduced-order model construction.

title: Reduced Order Modeling of Energetic Materials Using Physics-Aware Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks in a Latent Space (LatentPARC)
abstract: Physics-aware deep learning for reduced-order modeling of complex spatiotemporal dynamics in energetic materials using recurrent convolutional networks in latent space.
method_summary: Physics-aware recurrent CNN operating in latent space for reduced-order simulation of energetic material dynamics.

title: Reduced-order Modeling for Parameterized PDEs via Implicit Neural Representations
abstract: Data-driven reduced-order modeling approach using implicit neural representations to efficiently solve parametrized PDEs for many-query problems.
method_summary: Implicit neural representation-based ROM for efficient parametric PDE solving across many query configurations.

title: Learning to Solve PDEs on Neural Shape Representations
abstract: Solves PDEs on neural implicit shape representations directly, enabling PDE solving on modern 3D assets without requiring traditional mesh discretization.
method_summary: PDE solver operating directly on neural implicit shape representations, bypassing mesh generation for shape analysis and engineering tasks.

title: Transolver++: An Accurate Neural Solver for PDEs on Million-Scale Geometries
abstract: Presents Transolver++, a highly parallel and efficient neural solver that can accurately solve PDEs on million-scale geometries for real industrial applications.
method_summary: Scalable transformer-based neural PDE solver achieving accurate solutions on million-element industrial-scale meshes.

title: Multi-patch Isogeometric Neural Solver for PDEs on CAD Domains
abstract: Combines physics-informed neural networks with multi-patch isogeometric analysis to solve PDEs directly on complex CAD domains without mesh generation.
method_summary: PINN + multi-patch IGA framework for meshless PDE solving directly on CAD geometry representations.

title: Neural PDE Solvers with Physics Constraints
abstract: Addresses the challenge of incorporating hard physics constraints into neural PDE solvers, ensuring physical consistency of predictions for science and engineering applications.
method_summary: Neural PDE solver architecture with built-in physics constraint enforcement for physically consistent predictions.

title: Structural Design Through Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Introduces SOgym, a novel open-source RL environment for topology optimization, enabling RL agents to learn structural design through interactive optimization.
method_summary: OpenAI Gym-compatible RL environment for topology optimization enabling agents to learn structural design policies.

title: Differentiable Finite Element Analysis Solver for Structural Optimization and Seamless Integration with Neural Networks
abstract: Develops a differentiable FEA solver enabling seamless integration with neural networks for end-to-end structural optimization with gradient-based learning.
method_summary: Differentiable FEA solver enabling gradient flow through structural analysis for neural network-integrated optimization.

title: Real-time Design of Architectural Structures with Differentiable Simulators and Neural Networks
abstract: Combines neural networks with differentiable mechanics simulators for real-time shape approximation of architectural structures during interactive design.
method_summary: Neural network + differentiable mechanics simulator for real-time interactive architectural structural design.

title: Evaluation of Architectural Synthesis Using Generative AI
abstract: Evaluates multimodal generative AI for architectural tasks including interpreting technical drawings and creating 3D CAD models, assessing democratization of specialized architectural design.
method_summary: Systematic evaluation of generative AI capabilities for architectural drawing interpretation and 3D model creation.

title: Accelerating Inverse Materials Design using Generative Diffusion Models with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: MatInvent combines diffusion models with RL for inverse materials design, achieving robust multi-property optimization for low-supply-chain-risk magnets and high-kappa dielectrics.
method_summary: Diffusion model + RL framework for inverse materials design with multi-objective property optimization.

title: Heterogeneous Metamaterials Design via Multiscale Neural Implicit Representation
abstract: Designs heterogeneous metamaterials using multiscale neural implicit representations, enabling complex engineering tasks requiring spatially varying material properties.
method_summary: Multiscale neural implicit representation for designing heterogeneous metamaterials with spatially varying properties.

title: Data-Driven Design for Metamaterials and Multiscale Systems: A Review
abstract: Reviews data-driven approaches for metamaterial design and multiscale systems, covering machine learning methods for structure-property mapping and inverse design.
method_summary: Review of ML-based metamaterial design covering forward prediction, inverse design, and multiscale optimization approaches.

title: An Uncertainty-aware Deep Learning Framework-based Robust Design Optimization of Metamaterial Units
abstract: Develops uncertainty-aware deep learning for robust design optimization of mechanical metamaterial units, accounting for manufacturing variability.
method_summary: Uncertainty-quantified deep learning framework for robust metamaterial unit cell design under manufacturing uncertainty.

title: Inverse Design of Metamaterials with Manufacturing-Guiding Spectrum-to-Structure Conditional Diffusion Model
abstract: Conditional diffusion model for inverse design of metamaterials that generates manufacturable structures from target electromagnetic spectra.
method_summary: Spectrum-to-structure conditional diffusion model for manufacturing-aware inverse metamaterial design.

title: Algebraic Language Models for Inverse Design of Metamaterials via Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Extends generative ML to inverse design of 3D metamaterials using algebraic language models combined with diffusion transformers for structure generation.
method_summary: Algebraic language model + diffusion transformer for generating 3D metamaterial structures from target properties.

title: TripOptimizer: Generative 3D Shape Optimization and Drag Prediction using Triplane VAE Networks
abstract: Introduces TripOptimizer, a fully differentiable framework using triplane VAE for high-fidelity 3D geometry reconstruction and aerodynamic drag coefficient prediction.
method_summary: Triplane VAE with implicit neural representation for joint 3D shape generation and aerodynamic drag prediction.

title: Accelerating Shape Optimization by Deep Neural Networks with On-the-fly Determined Architecture
abstract: Global shape optimization using multi-objective evolutionary algorithms accelerated by DNNs with dynamically determined architecture during optimization.
method_summary: Evolutionary algorithm + adaptive DNN surrogate for accelerated multi-objective aerodynamic shape optimization.

title: Surrogate-Based Differentiable Pipeline for Shape Optimization
abstract: Demonstrates an end-to-end differentiable pipeline where a 3D U-Net surrogate replaces both meshing and simulation for aerodynamic shape optimization.
method_summary: End-to-end differentiable optimization pipeline using 3D U-Net surrogate replacing mesh generation and CFD simulation.

title: A Graph Neural Network Surrogate Model for Multi-Objective Fluid-Acoustic Shape Optimization
abstract: GNN-based surrogate for multi-objective fluid-acoustic shape optimization, transforming mesh-based simulations into computational graphs for fast evaluation.
method_summary: GNN surrogate converting mesh simulations to graphs for multi-objective fluid-acoustic optimization.

title: A Mechanism-informed Reinforcement Learning Framework for Shape Optimization of Airfoils
abstract: RL framework for airfoil shape optimization using Bezier curve parameterization and attention mechanisms for efficient dimensionality reduction and geometric accuracy.
method_summary: Mechanism-informed RL with Bezier parameterization and attention for aerodynamic airfoil shape optimization.

title: A Neural Surrogate-Enhanced Multi-Method Framework for Robust Wing Design Optimization
abstract: Modular optimization framework for wing design using VLM-based aerodynamic assessment and neural network surrogates for faster early-phase design.
method_summary: Multi-method wing design framework combining VLM aerodynamics with neural surrogates for robust optimization.

title: Faster by Design: Interactive Aerodynamics via Neural Surrogates Trained on Expert-Validated CFD
abstract: AI-based surrogate models for interactive aerodynamic design trained on expert-validated CFD data, addressing limitations of public datasets dominated by simplified car shapes.
method_summary: Neural surrogate trained on expert-validated industrial CFD for real-time interactive aerodynamic design exploration.

title: An Evolutionary Multi-objective Optimization for Replica-Exchange-based Physics-informed Neural Operator Learning Networks
abstract: Combines evolutionary multi-objective optimization with replica-exchange training for physics-informed neural operators, improving convergence for PDE solving.
method_summary: Evolutionary multi-objective optimization combined with replica-exchange training for physics-informed operator learning.

title: Adapting OpenAI's CLIP Model for Few-Shot Image Inspection in Manufacturing Quality Control
abstract: Adapts CLIP for few-shot manufacturing quality inspection, achieving high classification accuracy with 50-100 examples per class for single-component applications.
method_summary: CLIP adaptation for few-shot visual quality inspection in manufacturing with minimal labeled examples.

title: Evaluating Vision Transformer Models for Visual Quality Control in Industrial Manufacturing
abstract: Evaluates Vision Transformer models for early defective product detection in industrial manufacturing quality control systems.
method_summary: Systematic evaluation of ViT architectures for industrial manufacturing defect detection and quality control.

title: An Incremental Unified Framework for Small Defect Inspection
abstract: AI-driven unified defect inspection framework that handles diverse product portfolios and evolving production lines through incremental learning.
method_summary: Incremental learning framework for unified small defect inspection across diverse industrial product lines.

title: Critical Analysis and Best Practices for Visual Industrial Anomaly Detection
abstract: Critical analysis of visual industrial anomaly detection methods with best practices for manufacturing quality control, covering cost reduction through early fault detection.
method_summary: Comprehensive analysis and best practices guide for visual anomaly detection in industrial manufacturing.

title: AI-Driven Multi-Stage Computer Vision System for Defect Detection in Laser-Engraved Industrial Nameplates
abstract: Multi-stage CV system for automated defect detection in laser-engraved industrial nameplates in air disc brake manufacturing.
method_summary: Multi-stage computer vision pipeline for laser engraving defect detection in industrial nameplate manufacturing.

title: A Comprehensive Survey for Real-World Industrial Defect Detection
abstract: Comprehensive survey covering the full landscape of real-world industrial defect detection methods, from classical to deep learning approaches.
method_summary: Survey of industrial defect detection covering datasets, methods, and deployment challenges in real manufacturing.

title: Planning for Multi-Robot Reaching with Graph Neural Networks and Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Collision-free coordination of multiple robots for manufacturing tasks in shared obstacle-rich workspaces using GNN and RL.
method_summary: GNN + RL for multi-robot collision-free motion planning in shared manufacturing workspaces.

title: On the Role of Artificial Intelligence Methods in Modern Force-Controlled Manufacturing Robotic Tasks
abstract: Position paper exploring AI integration into force-controlled robotic tasks for advanced manufacturing including grinding, polishing, and deburring.
method_summary: Survey of AI methods for force-controlled manufacturing robotics covering grinding, polishing, assembly, and deburring.

title: RoboGrind: Intuitive and Interactive Surface Treatment with Industrial Robots
abstract: Integrated framework for automating surface treatment tasks (grinding, sanding, polishing) with industrial robots, addressing the challenge of programming complex force-controlled motions.
method_summary: Integrated robotic surface treatment framework combining intuitive programming with force-controlled grinding and polishing.

title: Robotic Grinding Skills Learning Based on Geodesic Length Dynamic Motion Primitives
abstract: Learning robotic grinding skills using geodesic length dynamic motion primitives for complex surface finishing on curved workpieces.
method_summary: Geodesic-length DMP for learning robotic grinding trajectories on complex curved surfaces.

title: Sparse Attention-driven Quality Prediction for Production Process Optimization in Digital Twins
abstract: Sparse attention mechanism for real-time quality prediction in production process digital twins, enabling fine-tuning of production line parameters.
method_summary: Sparse attention neural network for real-time quality prediction and process optimization in manufacturing digital twins.

title: Digital Twins in Additive Manufacturing: A Comprehensive Review
abstract: Reviews digital twin applications in additive manufacturing for real-time production monitoring, quality control, and process optimization.
method_summary: Comprehensive review of digital twin frameworks for AM covering monitoring, prediction, and closed-loop control.

title: Investigation on Domain Adaptation of Additive Manufacturing Monitoring Systems to Enhance Digital Twin Reusability
abstract: Addresses digital twin reusability through domain adaptation of ML-based monitoring systems for powder bed fusion, focusing on melt pool observation transfer.
method_summary: Domain adaptation techniques for transferring AM monitoring models between machines to enhance digital twin reusability.

title: Learning Actionable World Models for Industrial Process Control
abstract: Learns world models that disentangle process parameters in latent representations for fine-grained industrial process control.
method_summary: Disentangled world model learning in latent space for interpretable and controllable industrial process optimization.

title: Graph Neural Networks for Scalable Prediction of Grain-Level Fatigue Indicator Parameters
abstract: GNN approach for scalable prediction of grain-level fatigue indicator parameters in structural alloys, addressing the high cost of experimental fatigue testing.
method_summary: GNN predicting grain-level fatigue indicators from microstructure graphs for efficient fatigue life assessment.

title: Deep Operator Learning with Domain-informed Features for Fatigue Life Prediction
abstract: Deep operator learning with domain-informed features addressing overfitting from small fatigue experimental datasets for material-specific fatigue life prediction.
method_summary: DeepONet with domain-informed feature engineering for fatigue life prediction under limited experimental data.

title: A Certifiable Machine Learning-Based Pipeline to Predict Fatigue Life of Aircraft Structures
abstract: Certifiable ML pipeline for fatigue life prediction of aircraft structures, addressing aerospace safety requirements for early fatigue crack detection.
method_summary: Certification-ready ML pipeline for aerospace fatigue life prediction meeting aviation safety standards.

title: Physics-based Machine Learning for Fatigue Lifetime Prediction under Non-uniform Loading Scenarios
abstract: Physics-based ML embedding physical constraints from experimental fatigue data for lifetime prediction under non-uniform loading conditions.
method_summary: Physics-constrained FFNN for fatigue lifetime prediction embedding experimental physical constraints.

title: Predictive Modeling and Uncertainty Quantification of Fatigue Life in Metal Alloys using Machine Learning
abstract: ML methods with uncertainty quantification for fatigue life prediction in metal alloys, providing reliable confidence intervals for material property predictions.
method_summary: ML ensemble with uncertainty quantification for reliable fatigue life prediction with confidence bounds.

title: Multimodal Learning of Melt Pool Dynamics in Laser Powder Bed Fusion
abstract: Multimodal learning approach for understanding melt pool dynamics in LPBF additive manufacturing, combining multiple sensor modalities for process monitoring.
method_summary: Multimodal fusion of sensor data for melt pool dynamics prediction and monitoring in LPBF.

title: Towards Reproducible Machine Learning-based Process Monitoring and Quality Prediction Research for Additive Manufacturing
abstract: Addresses reproducibility challenges in ML-based AM process monitoring and quality prediction, proposing standardized evaluation frameworks.
method_summary: Reproducibility framework for ML-based additive manufacturing process monitoring and quality prediction research.

title: In-situ Process Monitoring and Adaptive Quality Enhancement in Laser Additive Manufacturing
abstract: In-situ monitoring with adaptive quality enhancement for laser additive manufacturing, enabling real-time defect detection and process correction.
method_summary: Closed-loop in-situ monitoring with adaptive control for real-time quality enhancement in laser AM.

title: Deep Learning based Optical Image Super-Resolution via Generative Diffusion Models for Layerwise in-situ LPBF Monitoring
abstract: Generative diffusion models for optical image super-resolution in layerwise LPBF monitoring, enabling defect identification from low-resolution in-situ images.
method_summary: Diffusion-based super-resolution for enhancing in-situ LPBF monitoring images to detect sub-resolution defects.

title: Towards a Deep Learning-based Online Quality Prediction System for Welding Processes
abstract: Deep learning for online weld quality prediction in non-laboratory environments with frequently changing process parameters.
method_summary: Deep learning system for real-time weld quality prediction under varying industrial process conditions.

title: Improved Training Strategies for Physics-Informed Neural Networks using Real Experimental Data in Aluminum Spot Welding
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks trained on real experimental data for resistance spot welding quality prediction, targeting weld nugget diameter as key metric.
method_summary: PINN with improved training strategies using real experimental data for spot welding quality prediction.

title: Out of Distribution Detection for Efficient Continual Learning in Quality Prediction for Arc Welding
abstract: Integrates OOD detection with continual learning for arc welding quality prediction, triggering model updates only when necessary to minimize labeling costs.
method_summary: OOD detection + continual learning for adaptive arc welding quality prediction with minimal retraining.

title: Deep Learning-Driven Enhancement of Welding Quality Control
abstract: Deep learning model for predicting critical weld KPCs including welding penetration and bead geometry for quality assurance.
method_summary: DL model predicting weld penetration and bead geometry KPCs for automated welding quality control.

title: Automated Plan Refinement for Improving Efficiency of Robotic Layup of Composite Sheets
abstract: Automated refinement of draping plans for robotic composite sheet layup, improving efficiency of automated composite manufacturing.
method_summary: Automated optimization of robotic composite layup plans for improved manufacturing efficiency.

title: Deep Neural Networks based Predictive-Generative Framework for Designing Composite Materials
abstract: DNN-based predictive-generative framework for composite material design, enabling rapid exploration of composition-property relationships.
method_summary: Predictive-generative DNN framework for automated composite material design and property optimization.

title: An Efficient and Uncertainty-aware Reinforcement Learning Framework for Quality Assurance in Extrusion Additive Manufacturing
abstract: RL agent dynamically adjusting flow rate and temperature in real-time for extrusion AM quality assurance with uncertainty awareness.
method_summary: Uncertainty-aware RL for real-time process parameter control in extrusion additive manufacturing.

title: Explainable AI for Correct Root Cause Analysis of Product Quality in Injection Moulding
abstract: XAI-aided root cause analysis relating machine settings to output quality characteristics in injection moulding for correct defect attribution.
method_summary: Explainable AI for injection moulding root cause analysis linking process parameters to quality deviations.

title: Single and Multi-Objective Real-Time Optimisation of an Industrial Injection Moulding Process via Bayesian Adaptive Design of Experiment
abstract: First experimental Bayesian optimization approach for real-time injection moulding optimization using process and sensor data.
method_summary: Bayesian adaptive DoE for real-time multi-objective injection moulding process optimization.

title: Improving Industrial Injection Molding Processes with Explainable AI for Quality Classification
abstract: XAI providing insights into model decision-making and identifying relevant features for injection molding quality classification.
method_summary: Explainable AI for feature importance analysis in injection molding quality classification.

title: Toward Knowledge-Guided AI for Inverse Design in Manufacturing
abstract: Addresses limitations of purely data-driven approaches for inverse design in manufacturing by incorporating domain knowledge guidance.
method_summary: Knowledge-guided AI framework combining domain expertise with data-driven methods for manufacturing inverse design.

title: neuralCAD-Edit: An Expert Benchmark for Multimodal-Instructed 3D CAD Model Editing
abstract: First benchmark for editing 3D CAD models collected from expert CAD engineers with realistic multimodal editing requests rather than text-only conditioning.
method_summary: Expert-curated benchmark for multimodal CAD model editing with realistic engineering modification requests.

title: 3DGen-Bench: Comprehensive Benchmark Suite for 3D Generative Models
abstract: Comprehensive benchmark suite with automated evaluation system for equitable evaluation of 3D generative models.
method_summary: Standardized benchmark suite with automated metrics for fair comparison of 3D generation methods.

title: A Large-Scale CAD Drawings Dataset and New Baseline for Panoptic Symbol Spotting
abstract: Novel CAD data annotation engine leveraging intrinsic attributes from archived CAD drawings for automatic high-quality annotation generation at scale.
method_summary: Automated annotation engine exploiting CAD file attributes for large-scale panoptic symbol spotting dataset creation.

title: Automated Parsing of Engineering Drawings for Structured Information Extraction Using a Fine-tuned Document Understanding Transformer
abstract: Fine-tuned document understanding transformer for automated structured information extraction from engineering drawings.
method_summary: Document understanding transformer fine-tuned for structured parsing of engineering drawing content.

title: From Engineering Diagrams to Graphs
abstract: Digitizing engineering diagrams like P&IDs into graph representations for maintainability and operational efficiency of process systems.
method_summary: Automated conversion of engineering diagrams (P&IDs) into structured graph representations.

title: Context-Aware Mapping of 2D Drawing Annotations to 3D CAD Features Using LLM-Assisted Reasoning for Manufacturing Automation
abstract: LLM-assisted pipeline mapping 2D drawing annotations to 3D CAD features achieving 83.67% precision and 90.46% recall on real CAD-drawing pairs.
method_summary: LLM-assisted reasoning pipeline for mapping 2D engineering drawing annotations to corresponding 3D CAD features.

title: Benchmarking Multimodal Models on Architectural and Engineering Drawings Understanding
abstract: Benchmark for evaluating multimodal AI models on understanding architectural and engineering drawings.
method_summary: Evaluation benchmark testing multimodal model capabilities on architectural and engineering drawing comprehension.

title: IEC3D-AD: A 3D Dataset of Industrial Equipment Components for Unsupervised Point Cloud Anomaly Detection
abstract: Point cloud anomaly detection dataset collected from actual production lines for real industrial scenarios with industrial equipment components.
method_summary: Real-world industrial 3D point cloud dataset from production lines for unsupervised anomaly detection research.

title: Synthetic 3D Data Generation Pipeline for Geometric Deep Learning in Architecture
abstract: Field-specific synthetic data generation pipeline producing arbitrary amounts of 3D architectural data with 2D and 3D annotations for geometric deep learning.
method_summary: Automated synthetic 3D data pipeline generating annotated architectural datasets for geometric deep learning.

title: Generating Human-AI Collaborative Design Sequence for 3D Assets via Differentiable Operation Graph
abstract: Generates human-AI collaborative design sequences for 3D assets using differentiable operation graphs, bridging AI generation with human design workflows.
method_summary: Differentiable operation graph for generating collaborative human-AI 3D design sequences.

title: A Solver-Aided Hierarchical Language for LLM-Driven CAD Design
abstract: Hierarchical language combining LLM generation with constraint solvers for parametric CAD design, enabling precise geometry through solver-aided construction.
method_summary: Solver-aided hierarchical DSL enabling LLMs to generate precise parametric CAD through constraint solving.

title: LLM Agents for Structured, Textured and Interactive 3D Modeling
abstract: LLM-based agents for creating structured, textured, and interactive 3D models through natural language interaction.
method_summary: LLM agent system for interactive 3D modeling with structure, texture, and interactivity from natural language.

title: Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reinforcement Learning for Precise CAD Code Generation
abstract: Combines CoT-based cold start with goal-driven RL using executability, geometric accuracy, and external evaluation rewards for precise CAD code generation.
method_summary: CoT + RL with multi-reward (executability, geometry, evaluation) for precise parametric CAD code generation.

title: Exploring Tool-Using Large Language Models in Text-to-CAD Generation with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Explores LLM agents using CAD tools for text-to-CAD generation, combining tool-use capabilities with RL for improved design quality.
method_summary: Tool-augmented LLM agent with RL for text-to-CAD generation through iterative tool interaction.

title: Procedural 3D Generation and Parametric Editing of 3D Shapes with Large Language Models
abstract: LLM-based procedural 3D generation enabling parametric editing of generated shapes through natural language instructions.
method_summary: LLM-driven procedural generation with parametric editing capabilities for interactive 3D shape creation.

title: Generative Parametric Design: A Framework for Real-time Geometry Generation and On-the-fly Multiparametric Approximation
abstract: Novel Generative Parametric Design framework enabling real-time geometry generation and on-the-fly multiparametric approximation for simulation-based engineering.
method_summary: Real-time generative parametric design framework combining geometry generation with multiparametric simulation approximation.

title: Experiments on Generative AI-Powered Parametric Modeling and BIM for Architectural Design
abstract: Architectural design framework utilizing ChatGPT and Veras with parametric modeling and BIM to enhance the design process.
method_summary: Integration of generative AI (ChatGPT) with parametric modeling and BIM for AI-enhanced architectural design.

title: Designing a Human-AI Collaborative Ideation System for Concept Designers
abstract: Human-AI collaborative ideation system for concept designers in entertainment industry, supporting intensive research and brainstorming in early design phases.
method_summary: Human-AI collaborative system for concept design ideation combining AI generation with designer creativity.

title: Advanced Knowledge Extraction of Physical Design Drawings, Translation and Conversion to CAD Formats using Deep Learning
abstract: Deep learning approach using YOLOv7 and Faster R-CNN for detecting objects in physical drawings followed by edge detection for CAD format conversion.
method_summary: Object detection + edge detection pipeline for automated physical drawing digitization and CAD format conversion.

title: Fourier Neural Operators Explained
abstract: Comprehensive explanation of Fourier Neural Operators covering the spectral formulation that captures global correlations through learned Fourier-space transformations.
method_summary: Tutorial/survey explaining FNO architecture, spectral formulation, and applications in scientific computing.

title: Fourier-Embedded DeepONet for Spectrally Accurate Operator Learning
abstract: Enhances DeepONet with Fourier embedding for spectrally accurate operator learning of PDE solutions.
method_summary: Fourier-enhanced DeepONet achieving spectral accuracy in operator learning for PDE approximation.

title: Multimodal Object Detection using Depth and Image Data for Manufacturing Parts
abstract: Multi-sensor system combining RGB camera and 3D point cloud sensor for manufacturing part detection with precise alignment.
method_summary: RGB + 3D point cloud fusion for multimodal manufacturing part detection and localization.

title: Advancements in Point Cloud-Based 3D Defect Detection and Classification for Industrial Systems
abstract: Reviews 3D point cloud-based defect detection and classification methods for industrial condition monitoring and quality control.
method_summary: Survey of point cloud-based 3D defect detection methods for industrial inspection and monitoring.
